=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen_nestedCallback.ts ---
// refactor: 3:21-3:22
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const task =pipe( )Effect.promise(() => {
  if (Math.random() > 0.5) {
    return Promise.resolve(1)
  }
  if (Math.random() > 0.2) {
    return Promise.resolve(2)
  }
  return Promise.resolve(3)
})


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Wrap with Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen_nestedCallback.ts ---
// refactor: 3:21-3:22
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const task = Effect.gen(function*() { return yield* Effect.promise(() => {
  if (Math.random() > 0.5) {
    return Promise.resolve(1)
  }
  if (Math.random() > 0.2) {
    return Promise.resolve(2)
  }
  return Promise.resolve(3)
}) })
